description: CyberDefenders Spotlight macOS challenge — FruitBook AD1 custom-content carve (APFS Catalina) with user artifacts for Hansel Apricot and Super Sneaky.

expected_findings.note: AD1 manifest and strings identify multiple macOS user home directories carved from APFS Catalina data volume.
Spotlight index, Safari preferences, Downloads folder, and Slack workspace local storage appear in carved AD1 content.
